texto: Ours is no ordinary calling. Great opportunities and privileges have been bestowed upon us. To us, as a people, has been entrusted the grand and glorious labor of laying the foundation of the kingdom of God upon the earth. Every act of our lives should be performed with this in view. Nothing should be done by anyone calling himself a Latter-day Saint that will conflict with the policy which God has announced as proper to be adopted in establishing that kingdom" (The Discourses of Wilford Woodruff, p. 125).
explicacao: Orientação direta de Wilford Woodruff sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Ours is no ordinary calling. Great opportunities and privileges have been bestowed upon us. To us…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, responsibility, calling, útil em momentos de reflexao.
